description_long: This manhole cover is set within a square, dark, and weathered pavement slab. The circular cover itself features an intricate, colorful design with a prominent depiction of a traditional Japanese castle, likely Osaka Castle, surrounded by stylized waves and blooming cherry blossoms. The artwork is rendered in shades of blue, green, and white, giving the cover a decorative and cultural appearance. The surface is slightly recessed within the square frame, and there are three visible notches around the edge for lifting or removal. A triangular warning symbol is embossed in one corner of the surrounding slab, adding a functional safety element. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for urban environments with both aesthetic and practical considerations.
description: A decorative manhole cover set in a dark square slab, featuring a Japanese castle and cherry blossom motif in blue, green, and white. The cover is robust, with notches and a warning symbol on the pavement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full castle and cherry blossom design, with the triangular warning symbol visible on the lower right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the edge of the cover and the continuation of the floral and architectural motif.
description_view_2: Rear view with the castle design partially visible and the notches around the cover's edge more apparent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the floral elements and the edge of the square slab.
attribute_pattern_design: Intricate surface pattern featuring a stylized Japanese castle, cherry blossoms, and flowing wave motifs, all rendered in colored paint with a circular composition.
